message:
feat(core): add disjoint_intervals.rs — sorted non-overlapping interval set with merge-on-insert (ft-283h4.31)

Implement a DisjointIntervals set that maintains sorted, non-overlapping
half-open intervals [start, end) with automatic merge-on-insert. Supports
O(log n) point containment, range intersection, gap detection, and
interval removal (hole punching).

API: insert, contains, intersects, remove, span, gaps, intervals,
min_start, max_end, clear, stats. Also Interval type with merge,
overlaps, contains_point.

Includes 30 inline unit tests and 40+ proptest property-based tests
covering: disjointness/sorted invariants, contains consistency, span
as sum of lengths, gaps+intervals partition universe, insert
commutativity/associativity, remove clears range/preserves outside/
maintains invariants, interval merge commutativity/overlap symmetry,
clone equivalence/independence, clear, serde roundtrip, stats.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
